title: Sector engagement KG taxonomy split complete
body: Closed sector-engagement taxonomy pass. Knowledge graph planning is now split into: internal Oak KG integration under .agent/plans/knowledge-graph-integration, ontology workspace reassessment for the sibling oak-curriculum-ontology repo, external KG adoption under sector-engagement/knowledge-graph-adoption, and external knowledge-source ingestion under sector-engagement/external-knowledge-sources. Added Oak OpenAPI monorepo integration brief and external material triage; retained Castr as future codegen replacement context.
